decisions.title: Use Redis for Real-Time Request Counting
decisions.summary: Handle high-concurrency traffic filtering using Redis

decisions.title: Move to Centralized S3 Storage
decisions.summary: Improve scalability by moving from local logging to centralized S3 storage

decisions.title: Restrict Port 22 to Internal VPN IPs
decisions.summary: Restrict Port 22 (SSH) to Internal VPN IPs only

rules.rule: Trigger SMS to Security Manager and log to blockchain ledger for 'Critical' severity alerts
Authentication tokens must expire within 15 minutes of inactivity
Support Hebrew and Arabic right-to-left alignment for tables, alert logs, and navigation menus

warnings.message: SQL Injection scanner uses outdated Regex patterns, risk of bypass is high
Non-sensitive customer fields are in plain text, must be addressed immediately
